---
name: Tech Debt
about: Flag technical debt or code quality issues
title: "[TECH DEBT] "
labels: tech-debt
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What is the technical debt and where does it live?

## Current State
How does it work now?

## Desired State
How should it work?

## Impact
What is affected if this isn't addressed? (performance, maintainability, correctness)

## Suggested Approach
How would you fix it?

## Effort Estimate
Small / Medium / Large
